# IHateCollege.com

> College is optional. Debt isn't. Real alternatives to a 4-year degree: trades, tech certs, apprenticeships, and careers that pay without loans.

IHateCollege.com publishes evidence-based content on student debt, college alternatives, and high-paying careers that don't require a 4-year degree. Current US student debt: $1.77 trillion across 44M borrowers. 53% of recent grads are underemployed.

## Key Pages
- [Is College Worth It? 2025](https://ihatecollege.com/is-college-worth-it-2025)
- [Debt Calculator](https://ihatecollege.com/debt-calculator)
- [College Rankings](https://ihatecollege.com/college-rankings)
- [Alternatives to College](https://ihatecollege.com/alternatives)
- [How to Make Money Without a Degree](https://ihatecollege.com/how-to-make-money-without-a-college-degree)
- [Civil Service Careers](https://ihatecollege.com/civil-service)
- [Cost of College](https://ihatecollege.com/cost)
- [Cheat Sheets](https://ihatecollege.com/cheat-sheets)
- [Blog](https://ihatecollege.com/blog)
- [Job Board](https://ihatecollege.com/job-board)
